creator: theo.studer@gmail.com
text:
On 19 ao=C3=BBt 2011, at 17:51, Andrey V. Elsukov wrote:

> On 19.08.2011 17:22, Th=D0=98ophile Studer wrote:
>> FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE #0: Mon Jul 19 02:36:49 UTC
>> 2010 root@mason.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64
>>> Description:
>> Since version 4.9, OpenBSD has a driver for Realtek
>> RTL8188CU/RTL8192CU USB IEEE 802.11b/g/n wireless network device.=20
>> This driver has not yet been ported to FreeBSD.
>>=20
>> Is it possible to do so ?
>=20
> It is already ported. This driver first appeared in FreeBSD 8.0.
>=20
> --=20
> WBR, Andrey V. Elsukov



"man urtwn" doesn't give me anything and I don't see any compatible =
drivers listed in =
http://www.freebsd.org/releases/8.2R/hardware.html#WLAN .=
